use_cases: Sending messages to selected character avatars in a floating dock interface
Selecting between multiple AI/human characters for conversation routing
Expanding a collapsed message input dock to reveal character options
Creating interactive character-based chat experiences with emoji avatars
Building accessible message composition with keyboard and click navigation
ai_summary: A versatile message dock component featuring expandable character selection with emoji avatars, online status indicators, and customizable gradients. Supports both light and dark themes with smooth Framer Motion animations for dock expansion and character selection. Ideal for building AI chat interfaces, character-based messaging systems, or multi-persona conversation apps with a playful, colorful aesthetic.
